meanings.definition: elegance by virtue of fineness of manner and expression
the result of good upbringing (especially knowledge of correct social behavior)
examples: a woman of breeding and refinement

meanings.definition: helping someone grow up to be an accepted member of the community
examples: they debated whether nature or nurture was more important

meanings.definition: the production of animals or plants by inbreeding or hybridization
the sexual activity of conceiving and bearing offspring
copulate with a female, used especially of horses
producing offspring or set aside especially for producing offspring
examples: retained a few bulls for breeding purposes
